"'''Explosive Developments'''" was a short story written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]] with illustrations by [[John Paul Lona]]. It was published in the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 3|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 3]] by [[West End Games]] in [[August]] [[1994]].

==Plot summary==
{{Plot|story}}

[[Jai Raventhorn]] attempts to [[Death/Legends|kill]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Antoll Jellrek]] at his estate on [[Romar]]. She is unsuccessful and is almost apprehended by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Beylyssa]].
